title: DQWay
content:
# DQWay

The direction of the data quality. If `output`, the app computes and produces the data quality value. If `input`, the app receives the data quality value.

## Enum Values

- `output`
- `input`
summary: The direction of the data quality. If `output`, the app computes and produces the data quality value. If `input`, the app receives the data quality value.
